class.name: flexiv_hardware/FlexivHardwareInterface
class.description: ROS 2 Control Hardware interface for the Flexiv robots. This driver uses Flexiv RDK. Position, Velocity and Effort interfaces are supported.

class.name: flexiv_hardware/FlexivDualHardwareInterface
class.description: ROS 2 Control Hardware interface for a pair of Flexiv robots. This driver uses Flexiv DRDK. Position, Velocity and Effort interfaces are supported.
